title: The First Deception
description: A theory has been published about ing1. Your aspect clues reveal the true signs — compare them against the claim and expose any contradiction.

hints.text: The publication claims ingredient 1 is alchemical pNn. Your clues give you the true aspects of ingredient 1 — compare each aspect against what the publication claims.

Alchemical pNn has R+, G−, B−. Your clues show ingredient 1's true aspects are R−, G+, B−. Any colour where the signs differ is a valid apprentice debunk: R (true − vs claimed +) or G (true + vs claimed −).
One apprentice debunk: reveal the R or G aspect of ingredient 1. The true sign contradicts what the publication claims → publication removed. B matches the claim so revealing B would have no effect.
